text.title: django-quality-linting Procedure
text.summary: Five steps to a validated quality stack spec.

step.name: declare-ruff
step.action: Set rule_groups = [E, W, F, I, B, C4, UP, SIM, DJ, T20] minimum. line_length 88 or 100. exclude_migrations=true. Add per_file_ignores for management/commands/*.py to bypass T20.

step.name: declare-mypy
step.action: Set django_settings_module to the test settings path. check_untyped_defs=true, warn_unused_ignores=true. strict_files starts with one or two service modules; expand incrementally.
step.decision-gate: Reject strict_files containing every app module on day one — expand incrementally.

step.name: define-pre-commit-hooks
step.action: Stage=commit (must be fast): ruff, ruff-format, mypy on changed files, manage.py check. Stage=push (may be slow): pytest, pip-audit.
step.decision-gate: Reject any commit-stage hook with fast=false.

step.name: define-ci-gates
step.input: CI runner + the team's tolerance for failures.
step.action: Required gates: ruff check, ruff format check, mypy strict on the strict_files set, manage.py check --deploy, makemigrations --check --dry-run, pip-audit --strict, coverage-gate at ≥ 80%.
